title: Prompt
description: Design strict operational prompts, skill bodies, agent instructions, and route contracts that keep agents inside the requested scope. Use when prompt behavior is the product surface.
body: Prompts should constrain behavior through clear source gates, ordered steps, ambiguity rules, output contracts, and explicit failure pressure. Strong pressure is valid when it is task-relevant, transparent in the prompt text, and aimed at preventing shortcut behavior, scope drift, fake progress, or rejected-idea memorialization.
